name: GIGABYTE X870E AORUS MASTER X3D ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-9000(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C with DP-Alt - HDMI 2.1 - 5GbE LAN - 10GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 (X870E A MASTER X ICE)
shortName: GIGABYTE X870E AORUS MASTER X3D ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x
description: Top-tier AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 x16, DDR5-9000, and dual Ethernet for enthusiasts.
